gatewayUrl.title: Shadow Warden Gateway URL
gatewayUrl.description: Base URL of the Shadow Warden AI gateway (e.g. https://ai.acme-msp.com)

apiKey.title: Tenant API Key
apiKey.description: Per-tenant X-API-Key for authenticating requests to the gateway.

tenantId.title: Tenant ID
tenantId.description: Opaque tenant identifier returned by POST /onboard.

ollamaUrl.title: Local Ollama URL
ollamaUrl.description: URL of a local Ollama instance for on-device inference (optional).

enabled.title: Extension Enabled
enabled.description: Master on/off switch for the Shadow Warden content filter.

managed.title: Managed by IT Policy
managed.description: Set to true by GPO/RMM to lock the UI against user modification.
